<div id="section1" class="section section-bg-dark yb-sec" tabindex="0">

<div class="two-sec-parent">

<div class="container">

<div class="left-side">

<div class="yugabyte-hero-section">

<div class="left-column">

<div class="content-hero">

# Distributed PostgreSQL for Modern Apps

<div class="section-copy fadein-property">

Meet YugabyteDB, the AI-ready, multi-modal, distributed PostgreSQL database for cloud-native apps. Resilient, scalable, flexible, and 100% open source.

</div>

<div class="cta for-desktop fadein-property">

<span class="yb--link-black cta-button-small" role="button" vid="j24p07Frw00">01. Play Overview</span> <a href="/demo/" class="yb--link-black cta-button-small" title="Request a Demo"><span>02. </span>Request a Demo</a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="ani-tags2-bg">

<div class="ani-tags2">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="right-columnm">

<img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Comply Advantage" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/comply-advantage-logo.svg" width="114" height="26" alt="Comply Advantage" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="logo">

<img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Plume" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/plume-logo.svg" width="1" height="1" alt="Plume" />

</div>

<img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="VinAudit" style="padding:5px 0" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/vinaudit-logo.svg" width="1" height="1" alt="VinAudit" />

</div>

<div class="logo" style="margin:5px 0 0 0">

<img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="xignite" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/xignite-logo.svg" width="1" height="1" alt="xignite" />

</div>

<div class="logo" style="margin:0 -40px">

<img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Well Fargo" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/well-fargo.svg" width="90" height="44" alt="Well Fargo" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="logo">

<img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Hyrox" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/hyrox-logo.svg" width="520" height="72" alt="Hyrox" />

</div>

<div id="section2" class="yugabyte-benefit-section come-out yb-sec" tabindex="0" lazy="yugabyte_benefit">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

<div class="container">

<div class="animated-img dots-animate">

<div class="dot-ami first">

</div>

<div class="dot-ami sec">

</div>

<div class="dot-ami third">

</div>

</div>

<div class="yb-benefit-inner">

<div class="yb-benefit-tabs">

<div>

<u>PostgreSQL++</u>

<div class="yb-benefit-copy">

<div class="title">

PostgreSQL and Beyond. No Compromises.

</div>

Get instantly productive with a PostgreSQL-compatible, multi-master RDBMS that supports stored procedures, triggers, and extensions. YugabyteDB elevates PostgreSQL with built-in connection management, observability, end-to-end security, and more.

</div>

</div>

<div>

<u>Built-in Resilience</u>

<div class="yb-benefit-copy">

<div class="title">

Built-in Resilience with Flexible Disaster Recovery

</div>

Keep your application online and performant despite unplanned failures or scheduled maintenance. Meet (and exceed) your SLAs with YugabyteDB’s high availability and disaster recovery features, designed to work optimally across zones, regions, and clouds.

</div>

</div>

<div>

<u>Scalability</u>

<div class="yb-benefit-copy">

<div class="title">

Seamless Scalability

</div>

Start small and add nodes as needed. Scale your data, connections, reads, and writes effortlessly without disrupting ongoing applications. As your needs grow, YugabyteDB automatically shards data and scales in all directions (up, down, out, and in).

</div>

</div>

<div>

<u>Global Design Patterns</u>

<div class="yb-benefit-copy">

<div class="title">

Versatile Design Patterns for Global Apps

</div>

Design and deploy the perfect architecture for your global application. Choose from various blueprints and replication techniques to distribute, access, and update your data to achieve the right mix of latency, resilience, and consistency.

</div>

</div>

<div>

<u>Enterprise Capabilities</u>

<div class="yb-benefit-copy">

<div class="title">

Fit for Enterprise-Critical Applications

</div>

Deploy and run your business-critical applications with confidence. YugabyteDB offers unparalleled enterprise capabilities, including next-gen AI features, seamless migration, reliable data protection, observability, backward compatibility, and end-to-end security.

</div>

</div>

<div>

<u>RAG and Gen AI Apps</u>

<div class="yb-benefit-copy">

<div class="title">

RAG and Gen AI Apps

</div>

YugabyteDB provides advanced vector indexing capabilities that support enterprise-grade, ultra-resilient RAG and GenAI applications.

- Easily manage 100s of millions of vectors
- Ultra-low-latency vector query response times
- Even distribution of vector indexes across clusters
- Perform vector similarity searches using SQL
- Build with YugabyteDB MCP Server
- Integrations with LangChain, OLLama, LlamaIndex, AWS Bedrock, and Google Vertex AI

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="yb-benefit-tabs-mob">

<div>

<div class="active">

<u>PostgreSQL++</u>

</div>

<div>

<u>Built-in Resilience</u>

</div>

<div>

<u>Scalability</u>

</div>

<div>

<u>Global Design Patterns</u>

</div>

<div>

<u>Enterprise Capabilities</u>

</div>

<div>

<u>RAG and Gen AI Apps</u>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="yb-benefit-img">

<div>

<img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="PostgreSQL and Beyond No Compromises" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/postgresql-beyond.svg" width="600" height="600" alt="PostgreSQL and Beyond No Compromises" />

</div>

<div>

<img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Built-in Resilience with Flexible Disaster Recovery" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/native-resilience-with-flexible-disaster-recovery.svg" width="600" height="600" alt="Built-in Resilience with Flexible Disaster Recovery" />

</div>

<div>

<img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Seamless Scalability" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/seamless-scalability.svg" width="600" height="600" alt="Seamless Scalability" />

</div>

<div>

<img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Versatile Design Patterns for Global Apps" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/versatile-blueprints-for-global-applications.svg" width="600" height="600" alt="Versatile Design Patterns for Global Apps" />

</div>

<div>

<img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Fit for Enterprise-Critical Applications" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/enterprise-grade-capabilities.svg" width="600" height="600" alt="Fit for Enterprise-Critical Applications" />

</div>

<div>

<img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Yugabytedb AI RAG  diagram" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/yugabytedb-ai-rag-diagram-600x600.png" width="600" height="600" alt="Yugabytedb AI RAG diagram" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="section yugabyte-cards-section yb-sec come-out" lazy="techie_loved">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

<div class="container">

<div class="section-head">

## Techie Lo<span class="primary-orange">♡</span>ed. Business Approved.

</div>

<div class="section-copy">

<div class="copy-details">

Whether you’re an app developer, architect, operator, or leader, YugabyteDB has you covered. <a href="/user-types/" class="yb--link-black cta-button-small" role="button" title="Find Out More">Find Out More</a>

</div>

<div class="copy-cards">

<div class="copy-card">

<div class="copy-card-details">

As a technologist, you’ll enjoy:

- Automatic data distribution for built-in resilience
- Intelligent scaling with automatic rebalancing
- Access to enterprise-grade security features
- Downtime-free maintenance
- Access to the rich PostgreSQL ecosystem

</div>

<div class="copy-card-cta">

<a href="/developers-hub/" class="yb--link-black" title="Explore Developer Hub">Explore Developer Hub</a>

</div>

</div>

<div class="copy-card">

<div class="copy-card-details">

As a business leader, you’ll achieve:

- Lower total cost of ownership (TCO)
- Database consolidation enabled by diverse workload support
- Accelerated cloud native adoption with risk-free migration
- Always-on business operations with reduced risks
- More resources available to focus on high-priority projects

</div>

<div class="copy-card-cta">

<a href="/yugabytedb/" class="yb--link-black" title="Discover YugabyteDB">Discover YugabyteDB</a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

<div class="yugabyte-usecase-cards-section section-bg-gray-1 yb-sec">

<div class="container">

<div class="section-head">

Top Use Cases

</div>

<div class="section-copy">

<div class="yb-usecase-cards">

<a href="/solutions/database-modernization/" class="yb-usecase-card"><span class="yb-usecase-card-count">01</span> <span class="yb-usecase-card-title">Database Modernization</span> <span class="yb-usecase-card-image"> <img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Database Modernization" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/database-modernization.png" width="704" height="408" alt="Database Modernization" /> </span> <span class="yb-usecase-card-details"><span>Legacy databases were not designed for cloud native apps. Boost productivity and eliminate costly tradeoffs with a distributed RDBMS that delivers on-demand scale and built-in resilience.</span></span></a> <a href="/solutions/cloud-native-apps/" class="yb-usecase-card"><span class="yb-usecase-card-count">02</span> <span class="yb-usecase-card-title">Cloud Native Applications</span> <span class="yb-usecase-card-image"> <img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Cloud Native Applications" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/cloud-native-applications.png" width="704" height="408" alt="Cloud Native Applications" /> </span> <span class="yb-usecase-card-details"><span>YugabyteDB is ideal for Kubernetes and microservice-based apps. It runs everywhere, scales rapidly across distributed clusters, and effortlessly withstands hardware and cloud failures.</span></span></a> <a href="/solutions/edge-iot/" class="yb-usecase-card"><span class="yb-usecase-card-count">03</span> <span class="yb-usecase-card-title">Edge and Streaming Apps</span> <span class="yb-usecase-card-image"> <img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Edge and Streaming Apps" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/edge-and-streaming.png" width="704" height="408" alt="Edge and Streaming Apps" /> </span> <span class="yb-usecase-card-details"><span>YugabyteDB powers global edge and streaming applications. It enables hybrid environments, eradicates data silos, and facilitates data collection from the edge and aggregation in the cloud.</span></span></a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

<div class="section yugabyte-in-action-section section-bg-dark yb-sec come-out" lazy="plateform_inaction">

<div class="container">

<div class="section-head">

## Try It Yourself

</div>

<div class="section-copy">

<div class="yb-inaction-inner for-mobile">

<div class="yb-popup-vid" vid="fCjTB8IuTuA">

<div class="yb-popup-vid-thumb">

<img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="interface" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/interface.png" width="1124" height="648" alt="interface" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="yb-inaction-inner for-desktop">

<div class="demo-section">

<div class="demo-overlay">

<div class="content-area">

<div class="h3">

How fast can you deploy YugabyteDB across multiple regions?

</div>

<div class="demo-detail">

Here’s the scenario: You’re an engineer who needs to protect your app and data from a cloud region failure. Let’s create a synchronized, multi-region cluster to replicate data across regions.

</div>

<div class="cta">

<span class="yb--link-black cta-button-small" role="button">Let’s Do It!</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span class="close-demo"></span>

</div>

</div>

<div class="cta-full-single cta-orange">

This demo features our powerful, multi-cloud DBaaS. Get a free account and start exploring in minutes. <a href="https://cloud.yugabyte.com/signup" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="Sign Up">Sign Up</a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

<div class="section yugabyte-beyond-tech-section yb-sec" lazy="beyond_tech">

<div class="container">

<div class="section-inner">

<div class="section-left">

## Beyond the Technology

<div class="section-copy">

Yugabyte is more than a database provider; it’s a partner in facilitating process transformation and organizational enablement, providing the comprehensive tools and services you need for a successful database modernization initiative.

</div>

</div>

<div class="section-right">

<div class="yb-beyond-tech-slider">

<div class="yb-beyond-tech-slides">

<div class="active">

<div style="background-image:url(https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/icon-distributed-sql-database.svg);">

<div class="yb-beyond-tech-title">

Distributed SQL Database

</div>

<div class="yb-beyond-tech-details">

Meet the database of tomorrow, today.

</div>

<div class="yb-beyond-tech-cta">

<a href="/yugabytedb/" class="yb--link-black" title="Discover YugabyteDB">Discover YugabyteDB</a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div>

<div style="background-image:url(https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/icon-cloud-native-operations.svg);">

<div class="yb-beyond-tech-title">

Database Migration

</div>

<div class="yb-beyond-tech-details">

Seamlessly migrate your data with YugabyteDB Voyager.

</div>

<div class="yb-beyond-tech-cta">

<a href="/voyager/" class="yb--link-black" title="Discover Migration Tool">Discover Migration Tool</a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div>

<div style="background-image:url(https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/icon-training-and-enablement.svg);">

<div class="yb-beyond-tech-title">

Training and Enablement

</div>

<div class="yb-beyond-tech-details">

Access training, resources, and ongoing services.

</div>

<div class="yb-beyond-tech-cta">

<a href="https://university.yugabyte.com/" class="yb--link-black" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="Learn at Yugabyte University">Learn at Yugabyte University</a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="yb-beyond-tech-nav">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="yugabyte-success-stories-section yb-sec come-out" lazy="success_stories">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

<div class="container">

<div class="section-head">

## Customer Success Stories

</div>

<div class="container-inner-aside">

<div class="yb-success-items success-story owl-carousel">

<div class="yb-success-item item last-achievement two-achievements">

<span class="yb-success-thumb"> <img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Customer Success Story: Kroger" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/kroger-logo.svg" width="1" height="1" alt="Customer Success Story: Kroger" /> </span> <span class="yb-success-quote"> “Kroger took the time to convince ourselves that all the features we needed were available from Yugabyte and that it meets our needs.” </span> <span class="yb-success-quote-autor">Mahesh Tyagarajan, VP Engineering</span> <span class="yb-success-achievement"> **\>5,000** <u>Cores in production</u> </span> <span class="yb-success-achievement"> **\<10ms** <u>Database latency</u> </span> [](/success-stories/kroger-embraces-distributed-sql-database-with-yugabytedb-for-ecommerce/ "Customer Success Story: Kroger")

</div>

<div class="yb-success-item item last-achievement two-achievements">

<span class="yb-success-thumb"> <img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Customer Success Story: Top 5 Bank" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/top-5-us-bank-logo.svg" width="1" height="1" alt="Customer Success Story: Top 5 Bank" /> </span> <span class="yb-success-quote"> “We needed a resilient, active-active solution that would support a relational data model and ACID-compliant transaction along with near-linear horizontal scalability.” </span> <span class="yb-success-quote-autor">Sr. Engineer of Database Strategy</span> <span class="yb-success-achievement"> **0** <u>Apps experienced downtime</u> </span> <span class="yb-success-achievement"> **3+** <u>Regions supported with unified database</u> </span>

</div>

<div class="yb-success-item item last-achievement two-achievements">

<span class="yb-success-thumb"> <img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Customer Success Story: Justuno" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/justuno-logo.svg" width="140" height="28" alt="Customer Success Story: Justuno" /> </span> <span class="yb-success-quote"> “By consolidating our Cassandra, Neo4j, Microsoft SQL Server, and CockroachDB systems into a single YugabyteDB cluster we were able to radically simplify our operations.” </span> <span class="yb-success-quote-autor">Travis Logan, CTO/Co-Founder</span> <span class="yb-success-achievement"> **×3** <u>Better Performance</u> </span> <span class="yb-success-achievement"> **20K** <u>Queries/second</u> </span> [](/success-stories/justuno/ "Customer Success Story: Justuno")

</div>

<div class="yb-success-item item last-achievement two-achievements">

<span class="yb-success-thumb"> <img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Customer Success Story: netskope" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/netskope-logo.svg" width="612" height="95" alt="Customer Success Story: netskope" /> </span> <span class="yb-success-quote"> “The core capabilities of YugabyteDB allow us to easily scale and improve our reliability and performance without the tradeoffs of time and effort required by legacy solutions.” </span> <span class="yb-success-quote-autor">Jake Roersma, VP of Platform Engineering</span> <span class="yb-success-achievement"> **\#1** <u>Category-leading CASB solution</u> </span> <span class="yb-success-achievement"> **1M+** <u>SASE Users</u> </span> [](/success-stories/netskope-selects-yugabytedb-distributed-sql-database/ "Customer Success Story: netskope")

</div>

<div class="yb-success-item item last-achievement two-achievements">

<span class="yb-success-thumb"> <img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Customer Success Story: Catalan Health Authority" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/institut-catala-de-la-salut-logo.svg" width="1" height="1" alt="Customer Success Story: Catalan Health Authority" /> </span> <span class="yb-success-quote"> “YugabyteDB is built on open-source technologies, which gives Catalonia the perfect combination of vendor independence, future-proofing, and uncompromising performance.” </span> <span class="yb-success-quote-autor">Stefan Schraps, VP, Business & Community Mgmt, vitagroup</span> <span class="yb-success-achievement"> **80K** <u>Concurrent users</u> </span> <span class="yb-success-achievement"> **20Bill.** <u>Medical record documents</u> </span> [](/success-stories/catalan-health-authority/ "Customer Success Story: Catalan Health Authority")

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="cta text-center">

<a href="/success-stories/" class="yb--link-black cta-button-small" title="Read All Stories">Read All Stories</a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="container">

<div class="yb-connect-com-inner section-bg-dark">

<div class="yb-connect-com-inner-top">

<div class="section-head">

## Plug Into the YugabyteDB Community

</div>

<div class="section-copy">

<img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="Join the YugabyteDB Community" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/community-4pics.png" width="1272" height="864" alt="Join the YugabyteDB Community" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="cta-full-single cta-black">

*Learn, get help, and contribute!* [Join Our Community](/community/ "Join Our Community")

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

<div class="yugabyte-get-ready-section section-bg-dark yb-sec come-out">

<div class="container">

<div class="section-head">

Get Started Today

</div>

<div class="yb-get-ready-section-cards">

<div class="yb-get-ready-section-card section-bg-orange">

<div class="yb-get-ready-section-card-head">

<div class="yb-get-ready-section-card-content">

<div class="yb-get-ready-section-card-title">

Get a Free YugabyteDB Aeon Account

</div>

<div class="yb-get-ready-section-card-subs">

No initial fees or contracts. Start in minutes.

</div>

</div>

<div class="yb-get-ready-section-card-image">

<img src="/wp-content/themes/yugabyte/assets/images/lazy_placeholder.png" title="YugabyteDB icon" decoding="async" data-src="https://www.yugabyte.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/yb-logo-tm.svg" width="192" height="184" alt="YugabyteDB icon" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="yb-get-ready-section-card-cta">

<a href="https://cloud.yugabyte.com/signup" class="yb--link-white cta-button-small orange-icon-large" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="Sign Up">Sign Up</a> <a href="/demo/" class="yb--link cta-button-small button-bg-transparent" title="Book a Demo">Book a Demo</a>

</div>

</div>

<div class="yb-get-ready-section-card section-bg-gray-12">

<div class="yb-get-ready-section-card-head">

<div class="yb-get-ready-section-card-title">

Download the Open Source Database

</div>

</div>

<div class="yb-get-ready-section-card-cta">

<a href="https://download.yugabyte.com/#/" class="yb--link-black cta-button-small download-cta-icon" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="Download Latest Version">Download Latest Version</a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>
